title: Dominique Eddé, Lebanese writer: 'The present moment is overwhelming; it is one of destruction. All that remains is to think and to stand tall'
subhead: Confronted with the 'armed madness' unfolding in the Middle East, the Lebanese essayist calls for resistance from 'any intelligence capable of otherness and empathy.' 'It is up to each and every one of us to save within ourselves what makes our species human,' she writes.

title: UN inquiry says Russia committed 'crimes against humanity' in deporting Ukrainian children
subhead: The UN's Independent International Commission of Inquiry on Ukraine said Russia had deported or transferred 'thousands' of children from occupied areas of Ukraine.

title: French local elections: Radical left candidates targeted in disinformation campaign
subhead: A network of websites and fake social media accounts has attacked La France Insoumise mayoral candidates, such as Sébastien Delogu in Marseille. The sophisticated and well-funded operation's backers have yet to be identified.

title: Paris Fashion Week: At Celine and Chanel, bourgeois style takes a new direction
subhead: In their fall-winter 2026-2027 offerings, Michael Rider and Matthieu Blazy provide a sharp perspective on the chic wardrobe.

title: France scales up anti-drone measures to industrial level  as threat rises
subhead: As the government prepares to change the law to strengthen protection for sensitive sites, the industry is gearing up for a boom in the anti-drone market.

One week before France's local elections, electorate leans right, poll shows
subhead: With environmental issues taking a back seat, security issues coming to the fore and a clear increase in support for the far-right Rassemblement National, the survey conducted by Ipsos BVA for Le Monde, Cevipof and the Jean Jaurès Foundation paints an unprecedented picture of the French political landscape.

title: Thomas Piketty: 'In the face of Trump's militaristic drift and looming disaster, Europe must equip itself to have global influence'
subhead: Following the intervention in Venezuela, the war against Iran launched by the US president signals yet another admission of weakness by the United States, observes the economist in his column. This military agitation primarily serves to bolster the US economy.

title: Fashion's brand ambassadors step into an age of emancipation
subhead: For a long time, contracts between stars and fashion houses forbade them from appearing dressed in a rival label. Today, thanks to awards ceremonies and prestigious premieres, a new trend of increasing collaborations is emerging, shaking up the relationship between luxury and celebrities.
